package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for commit_or_rollback_split_across_functions_without_owner: Transaction end-state logic spread across helper functions with unclear ownership.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule016NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule016NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule016NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario016Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule016NegativeService, input Rule016NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
